name: ConfiguredTable
description: Represents a configured table in Clean Rooms.

id.description: The unique ID of the configured table.

arn.description: The ARN of the configured table.

name.description: A human-readable name for the configured table.

description.description: A description of the configured table.

createTime.description: The time when the configured table was created.

updateTime.description: The time when the configured table was last updated.

analysisMethod.description: The analysis method for the configured table.
